file_name: Australian Venue Co. - four licensed venues in metropolitan Sydney - Questionnaire_0.pdf

questions.text: Outline any concerns regarding the impact of the Acquisition on competition, including if Australian Venue Co. licensed venues and any of the target four licensed venues (Public House Petersham, The Erko, The Golden Sheaf and Barangaroo House) are close competitors and there are not many alternatives or if one is a major supplier to competitors of the other.
Provide any additional information or comments that you consider relevant to the ACCC’s assessment of the Acquisition.

Provide a brief description of your business or organisation, including any commercial relationships with Australian Venue Co. and/or the target four licensed venues (Public House Petersham, The Erko, The Golden Sheaf and Barangaroo House).
